requirements_addressed: Four digest files created (player, coach, resolver, router)
DigestValidator accepts exactly 700 tokens, warns at 701+
Missing digest file produces clear error (no silent fallback)
DigestLoader returns correct digest for each role
Prompt profile switching supports all four profiles
Phase 1: full rules bundle injected alongside digest
Unit tests cover validation boundaries (700/701), loading, profiles

completion_promises.criterion_text: Four digest files created (player, coach, resolver, router)
completion_promises.evidence: Created .guardkit/digests/player.md, coach.md, resolver.md, router.md with role-specific content for each agent role.
TestRealDigestFiles::test_each_digest_under_700_tokens validates all four digests are under 700 tokens using count_tokens(). All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: DigestValidator accepts exactly 700 tokens, warns at 701+
completion_promises.evidence: TestDigestValidator::test_exactly_700_tokens_accepted verifies 700-token digest passes without warning. TestDigestValidator::test_701_tokens_warns verifies 701+ tokens produces a warning. Both pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Missing digest file produces clear error (no silent fallback)
completion_promises.evidence: TestDigestValidator::test_missing_digest_raises_error and test_missing_digest_no_silent_fallback verify DigestLoadError is raised with clear message. TestDigestLoader::test_load_missing_digest_raises_error also covers the loader path. All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: DigestLoader returns correct digest for each role
completion_promises.evidence: TestDigestLoader tests (test_load_player_digest, test_load_coach_digest, test_load_resolver_digest, test_load_router_digest, test_load_correct_content_per_role) verify each role gets its own specific content. All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Prompt profile switching supports all four profiles
completion_promises.evidence: TestPromptProfile::test_all_four_profiles_exist verifies 4 profiles. TestPromptProfileAssembler tests verify digest_only, digest+graphiti, digest+rules_bundle, and digest+graphiti+rules_bundle all assemble correctly. All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Phase 1: full rules bundle injected alongside digest
completion_promises.evidence: TestPromptProfileAssembler::test_default_profile_is_digest_rules_bundle confirms default is digest+rules_bundle. TestPromptProfileAssembler::test_digest_rules_bundle_includes_both confirms both digest and rules bundle content are present. All pass.
TestRealDigestFiles::test_no_two_digests_identical checks all pairs of digest files for uniqueness. Passes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Token counting implemented (tiktoken or word-based fallback)
completion_promises.evidence: count_tokens() function implemented with tiktoken try/except falling back to character-based estimation (chars/4). TestTokenCounting class has 6 tests covering empty strings, single words, multiple words, markdown, and approximation accuracy. All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Digest content is stack-agnostic (no Python/Node/.NET-specific references)
completion_promises.evidence: TestRealDigestFiles::test_digests_are_stack_agnostic checks all four digest files against 18 stack-specific regex patterns (pytest, npm, dotnet, cargo, python, typescript, etc.). All pass - no stack-specific references found.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests cover validation boundaries (700/701), loading, profiles
completion_promises.evidence: 45 tests covering: token counting (6), DigestValidator with 700/701 boundary (10), DigestValidationResult (2), DigestLoader (8), PromptProfile enum (5), PromptProfileAssembler (6), real digest file validation (6), DIGEST_ROLES constant (2). All pass with 95%/92% coverage on source files.
